source_name: Clean Energy Council - battery storage installed and committed

fields.scope: Grid-scale battery storage capacity (utility BESS), separate from distributed household batteries. Pumped hydro is tracked separately because of long-duration characteristics.
fields.primary_source_document: Clean Energy Council, Clean Energy Australia (annual); CEC Quarterly Project Tracker.
fields.keying_plan: Key installed and committed grid-scale BESS in MW and MWh. Average duration (MWh/MW) is a key indicator of whether storage is sized for evening peak (1-2 hr) or longer dispatch (4+ hr).

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed grid-scale battery installed and committed capacity. Australia became the world's largest grid-battery installer per capita in 2023-24. The shift from short-duration FCAS-focused batteries to 4-hour dispatch batteries is the key qualitative trend.
citation: Clean Energy Council, Clean Energy Australia and Quarterly Project Tracker.
